mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, driving higher equity valuations and positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.0%, it signals severe labor market slack and weak aggregate demand, leading to downward revisions in earnings forecasts and negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate synchronized strength in consumer spending and real estate investment, generating positive momentum in equity markets over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) when either series is removed from the model.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects peak capacity utilization and strong corporate output, which translates to short-term positive equity returns as earnings momentum peaks.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during late-cycle expansion periods over a 1-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index above 225.0 signals entrenched inflationary pressures that force central banks to tighten policy, raising discount rates and compressing equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 225.0.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative Rank IC over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate earnings growth, producing a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 95.0 indicates a sharp contraction in manufacturing and industrial activity, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.
